rationale_source: F1.EL LENDER_SYNONYMS normalization: 4-variant lender names (RBC / Royal Bank of Canada / RBC Royal Bank / Royal Bank) resolve to single canonical entity

existing_mortgage_lender.rationale: All 4 source variants (RBC / Royal Bank of Canada / RBC Royal Bank / Royal Bank) resolve to same canonical entity via LENDER_SYNONYMS reverse-map. F1.EL broker_correction tier specifies 'Royal Bank' per broker preference.

must_include.rationale: Canonical F1.EL — any LENDER_SYNONYMS variant for RBC entity.
